name: AEGIS Governance
description: Technical governance specifications and machine-readable data for the AEGIS ecosystem. 73 specification documents across 7 domains, plus ATX-1 v2.2 threat taxonomy — 10 tactics, 58 techniques, structured in STIX 2.1 and JSON.
note: This site serves both human-readable specification documents (HTML) and machine-readable governance data (JSON). All data endpoints are open to all bots. Spec pages are indexable by search engines.

foundation.description: Manifesto, system overview, FAQ, and development roadmap

architecture.description: Reference architecture, governance engine, capability model, policy language, risk scoring, trust boundaries

protocol.description: AGP-1 governance protocol suite — authentication, messages, policy evaluation, trust model, wire format

threat-model.description: ATM-1 security analysis and ATX-1 technique taxonomy

identity.description: AIAM-1 identity and access management — composite identity, IBAC, intent claims, delegation, attestation

federation.description: GFN-1 governance federation network — trust model, feeds, node architecture, AT Protocol schema

rfc.description: RFC-0001 through RFC-0019 — architecture, runtime, events, deployment, identity

citation: K. Tannenbaum, "AEGIS: A Constitutional Governance Architecture for Autonomous AI Agents," AEGIS Initiative, 2026, doi: 10.5281/zenodo.19223924.
